failedAssertions.reason: Better-Auth config missing emailAndPassword: { enabled: true }. Sign-up API returns HTTP 400 with EMAIL_PASSWORD_SIGN_UP_DISABLED.

blockedAssertions.blockedBy: Auth broken: emailAndPassword not enabled in Better-Auth config
Auth broken: cannot access authenticated dashboard
Auth broken: cannot test message sending in dashboard
Auth broken: cannot test sign-out without successful login
Auth broken: full user flow blocked at authentication step
Auth broken: AI chat end-to-end blocked by dashboard inaccessibility
Auth broken: session persistence untestable without authentication

appliedUpdates.description: Added Flow Validator Guidance: App Shell Browser Testing section with browser session naming, test account assignments, isolation rules, and testing approach details
Documented critical quirks: turbo dev env var passthrough issue, Better-Auth emailAndPassword not enabled, BETTER_AUTH_SECRET missing from root .env

rootCause: Better-Auth configuration in apps/web/src/lib/auth.ts is missing `emailAndPassword: { enabled: true }`. This single config gap causes ALL email/password auth endpoints to reject requests, blocking 9 out of 23 assertions (1 failed + 8 blocked). The fix is to add `emailAndPassword: { enabled: true }` to the betterAuth() config object.
